azeez.risikat05@gmail.com.professional_summary:
I am an HR Generalist and Tech Recruiter with over six years of experience in talent acquisition, HR operations, and data-driven HR strategies. Passionate about leveraging HR analytics, automation, and digital transformation, I help organisations optimise recruitment processes, improve employee engagement, and drive business growth.

My expertise lies in:
 Talent Acquisition & Employer Branding: Designing data-backed sourcing strategies to attract top-tier talent.
 HR Analytics & Workforce Planning: Using HR metrics to inform hiring decisions and improve operational efficiencies.
 Employee Engagement & Culture Development: Enhancing workplace culture through strategic engagement initiatives.
 HR Digital Transformation: Implementing HRIS, ATS, and analytics tools to streamline HR processes.
Compliance & Policy Development : Ensuring organisations remain compliant while fostering an inclusive work environment.

Throughout my career, I have successfully reduced hiring time by 30%, developed HR analytics dashboards for real-time decision-making, and played a key role in implementing global HR policies. I thrive at the intersection of HR, data, and technology, constantly seeking innovative ways to transform HR operations.
